commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh When the people are gathered together, and the kingdoms, to serve the LORD. Augustine of Hippo 22. And how is it declared. "In the nations gathering together in one, and the kingdoms, that they may serve the Lord" (ver. How is this accomplished, unless by the blood of the slain. How accomplished, but by the groans of the fettered. Those therefore who were in tribulation and humility have been heard; that in our times the Church might be in the great glory which we see her in, so that the very kingdoms which then persecuted her, now serve the Lord.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
